org.arakhne.neteditor.io.eps

Class EpsGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.eps.EpsGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ViewGraphics2D
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    EpsTeXGraphics2D

    public class EpsGraphics2D
extends AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
    This graphic context permits to create an Encapsulated Postscript file from a graphic context.

    This graphic context supports the Postscript Reference Document Third Edition, and the EPS Reference Document 3.0.

    Since:
    0.4
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • isShadowDrawing

        public boolean isShadowDrawing()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Indicates if the drawings are for shadows or not.
        Returns:
        true if the drawings are for shadows, false otherwise.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Description copied from class: AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Overrides:
        pushRenderingContext in class AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.

      • popRenderingContext

        public void popRenderingContext()
        Description copied from class: AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Stop a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        popRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Overrides:
        popRenderingContext in class AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D

      • getShadowTranslationX

        public float getShadowTranslationX()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Replies the translation to apply along the X axis to draw the shadow of a figure.
        Returns:
        the translation along X for the shadow from the figures.

      • getShadowTranslationY

        public float getShadowTranslationY()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Replies the translation to apply along the Y axis to draw the shadow of a figure.
        Returns:
        the translation along Y for the shadow from the figures.

      • drawEpsString

        protected void drawEpsString(EpsGraphics2D.EpsContext context,
                 float x,
                 float y,
                 String str,
                 Color color)
        Draw a text in EPS.
        Parameters:
        context - is the EPS context.
        x - is the position of the text.
        y - is the position of the text.
        str - is the text to draw.
        color - is the color of the text.

      • prolog

        public void prolog()
            throws IOException
        Description copied from class: AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Invoked to export the prolog for the target format. This function should be overridden by subclasses to export a prolog into the target document.
        Overrides:
        prolog in class AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Throws:
        IOException

        public void epilog()

      • setDrawingAttributes

        protected void setDrawingAttributes(EpsGraphics2D.DrawingMode mode,
                        Color outlineColor,
                        Color fillingColor)
        Set the attributes for drawing a shape.
        Parameters:
        mode - is the mode of drawing.
        outlineColor - is the color of the outline.
        fillingColor - is the color of the interior.
